meta.title: Juliette's Bat Mitzvah
meta.description: Juliette's Bat Mitzvah celebration in Tel Aviv, 2026.

events.title: The Celebrations
events.subtitle: Special moments to share with Juliette

service.title: Bat Mitzvah Service & Kiddush
service.description: Join us for the morning service as Juliette reads from the Torah for the first time, followed by a festive Kiddush luncheon.
service.dressCodeDetails: Respectful attire. Ladies: Modest dress. Gentlemen: Suit or dress shirt.

party.title: Celebration Dinner & Party
party.description: The main event! An evening of dinner, dancing, and celebration under the Tel Aviv sky.
party.dressCodeDetails: Dress to impress! Elegant evening attire.

shabbat.title: Shabbat Dinner
shabbat.description: An intimate Shabbat dinner with family and close friends to continue the celebrations.
shabbat.dressCodeDetails: Comfortable and classy. Think Shabbat dinner with family.

bar.title: Saturday Night Out
bar.description: Wind down the weekend with drinks and good vibes at Juniper Bar. Adults only!
bar.dressCodeDetails: Come as you are. It's a bar night!

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.subtitle: We can't wait to celebrate with you

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Thank you! Your RSVP has been received.
